figures.caption: Figure 1: Pipeline for MSI prediction from whole slide images (H&E). Tile features are extracted using a foundation model, augmented with a peripheral distance (PD) spatial prior, and aggregated using TransMIL for slide-level prediction.

Table 2: TransMIL with spatial biological priors. Peripheral Distance (PD) encodes margin proximity. Local Immune Neighborhood (LIN) encodes neighborhood LYM/TUM ratio. READ MSS Spec is MSS specificity on TCGA-READ (49 MSS cases).

Table 1: Results for all foundation model and aggregator configurations. COAD MSI AUC is mean ± std across 5 folds. READ MSS Spec is MSS specificity on TCGA-READ (49 MSS cases). Kather 2019 benchmark AUC: 0.840 [4].
